source: Mosaic of 24 independent 224px NCT-CRC-HE tiles (real Kather colorectal H&E), classified one-by-one by frozen H-optimus-0 (ViT-g/14, 1536-d). This is a TILE-LEVEL sampling grid, not a whole slide — the tiles are not spatially contiguous, so there is no adjacency information.
sampling: tile-level · 24 independent tiles · no spatial adjacency
prompt: Input is a tile-level mosaic of 24 independent NCT-CRC-HE tiles (a sampling grid — the tiles are not spatially contiguous, so there is no adjacency information). Encoder tissue composition: TUM 42%, LYM 33%, STR 17%, NORM 4%, MUS 4%. Give a full diagnostic assessment: tumor grade, the cellular immune infiltrate, invasive features, and molecular / staging status.
